title: Alkem Laboratories is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Alkem Laboratories is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Alkem Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Alkem Laboratories:
Alkem Laboratories is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alkem Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
